name: issues_get_detail
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific issue by its unique ID. For Jira Epics, the response includes a childIssues array containing all issues linked to the epic.

azure_organization.description: Optionally set the Azure DevOps organization name. Required for Azure DevOps

azure_project.description: Optionally set the Azure DevOps project name. Required for Azure DevOps

issue_id.description: The Number or ID of the issue to retrieve. Supported formats include GitHub/GitLab numeric IDs (e.g., 123 or #123), Jira keys (e.g., PROJ-123), Linear issue IDs (UUID format), etc.

repository_name.description: Repository name. This is required for GitHub and GitLab

repository_organization.description: Organization name. This is required for GitHub and GitLab
